tool_args.content:
# Backup current brain_server.py
Copy-Item 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server.py' -Destination 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server.py.bak'

# Apply patch
Invoke-Expression "git apply 'C:\AI_VAULT\tmp_agent\state\rooms\room_p3_1_20260303_104350\patches\brain_episode_v1.diff'"

# Compile python file
python -m py_compile 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server.py'

# Run smoke tests
python smoke_tests.py
